prerequisites: A Finage account. Register at moon.finage.co.uk/register.
A Finage API key obtained from your Finage dashboard after registration (maps to the required api_key field).
One or more market symbols to pull data for (the required symbols config field).
A start_date for the historical data range you want to retrieve (the required start_date config field).

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Finage uses API key based authentication. The key is passed as the apikey query parameter on each request (for example https://api.finage.co.uk/last/stock/AAPL?apikey=YOUR_API_KEY). Provide it in the connector's api_key secret field.

setupSteps.title: Create a Finage account
setupSteps.body: Go to moon.finage.co.uk/register and sign up to obtain a free API key.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key
setupSteps.body: After registering, open your Finage dashboard to retrieve your API key. This key authenticates every request and is sent as the apikey query parameter.

setupSteps.title: Configure the api_key field
setupSteps.body: Paste your Finage API key into the connector's api_key field. It is stored as a secret.

setupSteps.title: Set the data scope
setupSteps.body: Provide the required symbols field (the ticker or instrument symbols to fetch) and the required start_date field (the beginning of the historical range).

setupSteps.title: Tune optional query parameters
setupSteps.body: Optionally set period, time, time_period, time_aggregates, and tech_indicator_type to control the granularity, time window, aggregation, and technical indicator output returned by the Finage endpoints.

sources.title: Finage API getting started and authentication
How to Obtain a Free API Key from Finage
